notes: Re-run after the testing setup was improved, and the first run with the Graphify knowledge graph available (the prior run was noGraphify:true). Graph-enriched: the components-without-tests check used the Threshold-Counter Feature community to confirm the component, the pure rule (statusForCount), and the hook (useThresholdCounter) are each directly tested. Static mode (no --with-run): coverage is reported at 100% over the collected feature surface; collectCoverageFrom excludes index.ts barrels and the main.tsx/App.tsx composition root (now documented inline, exercised by the E2E behaviour map). Re-graded results vs prior run: get-by-testid-is-rare violation -> present; query-distribution-favours-priority-one, coverage-thresholds-in-ci, coverage-enforced-in-ci, and components-have-minimal-coverage partial -> present. One partial remains: eslint-plugin-testing-library / eslint-plugin-jest-dom are not enforced because the linter is Biome, not ESLint (shared with /linting-audit).
